name: Necklace
description: A non-custodial wallet for Pearl (PRL). Keys never leave your device.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://blockbook.pearlresearch.ai https://safetrade.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'
